Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN T. HAFTER OF THE RIMON P.C. LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-810-8403 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
